focus_area: Repository discovery, baseline tests, static/security scan

commands.notes: Found Maven, pip, Flutter, Dockerfile and Compose manifests.

commands.summary: 23034 checkstyle findings across 386 Java files; mostly missing Javadocs, line length, final-parameter rules and brace style.
spotbugs goal is only configured in the Maven analysis profile, so the direct prefix command fails.
Python 3.12.9 is installed, but pytest is not installed in the active interpreter.
Python 3.12.9 is installed, but pytest is not installed in the active interpreter.
808 analyzer findings: 90 warnings, 718 info, 0 errors. Raw output saved to production-audit/flutter-analyze.txt.
Default counter smoke test expects text 0/1 and plus icon; current app no longer contains that UI.

findings.title: Hardcoded production-like secrets in Spring configuration
findings.root_cause: jwt.secret and stripe.secret.key are fixed literals in versioned application properties.
findings.impact: A leaked repository or deployed artifact compromises token signing and payment-service credentials.
findings.recommended_fix: Require JWT and Stripe secrets from environment variables, fail fast if missing outside local profile, and rotate any exposed values.

findings.title: AI service authentication disables itself when token env var is empty
findings.root_cause: Auth dependency returns success if the expected shared token is unset.
findings.impact: Misconfigured production services can expose inference endpoints without service authentication.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce explicit dev-only auth bypass and fail closed in prod; migrate to expiring service JWT or mTLS.

findings.title: Seed dataset with known admin passwords is packaged with backend resources
findings.root_cause: Large demo seed data is stored under runtime resources and includes known accounts/passwords.
findings.impact: Production artifact may leak realistic PII-like seed data and known credentials.
findings.recommended_fix: Move demo seeds outside packaged resources or exclude them from production builds; ensure seed import cannot run in prod.

findings.title: CSRF disabled while admin web flow uses cookie tokens
findings.root_cause: Single security chain disables CSRF globally for both REST and cookie-driven admin flows.
findings.impact: Authenticated browser sessions are more exposed to state-changing cross-site requests.
findings.recommended_fix: Separate stateless API and web-admin security chains or enable CSRF for cookie-authenticated routes.

findings.title: Python service tests cannot run in clean local environment
evidence: python -m pytest tests -v returned: No module named pytest
findings.root_cause: No checked-in virtualenv/bootstrap script or CI baseline command installs test dependencies first.
findings.impact: FastAPI and N8N contract reliability cannot be proven from the repository alone.
findings.recommended_fix: Add per-service test bootstrap scripts or a root CI workflow that creates isolated venvs and installs requirements.

findings.title: Flutter test suite is stale and failing
findings.root_cause: Default counter-template smoke test remains after app evolved into an authenticated academy app.
findings.impact: Mobile CI cannot protect auth, navigation, admin/scouting, or offline flows.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace template test with auth splash/login smoke tests and mock API storage/network dependencies.

findings.title: Static analysis is not production-ready
evidence: pylint, bandit, safety, trufflehog are not installed in the active environment
findings.root_cause: Quality gates exist partially but are not curated, normalized, or enforced across services.
findings.impact: CI would either fail noisily or skip important SAST/security checks.
findings.recommended_fix: Create practical CI gates: compile/tests first, then scoped lint baselines with incremental enforcement.

findings.title: Outbound service calls lack a unified resilience layer
findings.root_cause: Each client creates its own HTTP client; some set timeouts, but there is no shared retry/circuit-breaker/correlation policy.
findings.impact: Slow or failing dependencies can cascade into user-facing latency and inconsistent errors.
findings.recommended_fix: Add shared HTTP client policies: timeouts, bounded retry, circuit breaker, fallback, and correlation ID forwarding.

findings.title: Observability is incomplete and inconsistent
evidence: No Prometheus/OpenTelemetry configuration found in service manifests
Only ad-hoc tracing endpoint references found in Spring
findings.root_cause: Services expose some health/logging pieces but no cross-service observability standard.
findings.impact: Production incidents will be hard to correlate across mobile, Spring, FastAPI, N8N and chatbot.
findings.recommended_fix: Add correlation ID middleware/filters everywhere, structured JSON logs, metrics endpoints and trace propagation.

findings.title: Service contracts and endpoint inventory are not enforced
evidence: Scouting AI has 30+ FastAPI route declarations
Academy ranking AI has 2 FastAPI route declarations
Django chatbot exposes chat, health, metrics and auth-test URLs
findings.root_cause: OpenAPI exists for Spring and FastAPI by framework, but there is no generated contract test or version compatibility gate.
findings.impact: Backend payload changes can silently break FastAPI services or mobile clients.
findings.recommended_fix: Generate OpenAPI specs in CI and add contract tests for Spring-to-AI and mobile-to-Spring critical flows.

python_lint_sast.reason: pylint, bandit, safety and trufflehog are missing from active environment.

primary_call_graph: FastAPI services -> optional backend pull clients in legacy/scouting admin code

next_steps: Iteration 2: fix hardcoded Spring secrets and seed packaging risk with safe env defaults.
Iteration 3: make FastAPI service-token auth fail closed in prod and add auth tests.
Iteration 4: replace stale Flutter widget test with auth splash/login smoke test.
Iteration 5: create isolated Python test bootstrap and run FastAPI/N8N/Django tests.
Iteration 6: add correlation ID propagation to Spring and FastAPI service calls.
convergence_status: Baseline complete; production readiness is low until critical security/configuration findings are fixed.
